scripts.serve: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions
scripts.start:local: npm run build && node -e "require('dotenv').config({path:'.env'}); require('dotenv').config({path:'.env.local'}); const { app } = require('./lib/index.js'); app.listen(5002, () => console.log('Local MCP Server running at http://localhost:5002'))"
